title: Jon Wilkin
description: GB & England rugby league footballer & Sports broadcaster
extract: Jon David Wilkin (born 1 November 1983) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played as a second-row, loose forward, scrum-half or stand-off in the 2000s, 2010s and 2020s. He played for Hull Kingston Rovers, St Helens and the Toronto Wolfpack at club level and for England and Great Britain at international level.
